cases.title: 2-step token rewrite
cases.prompt:
Starting text: red square
Apply steps in order:
1) Replace 'red' with 'blue'.
2) Append '!' to the end.
Return only the final text.

cases.title: 4-step phrase rewrite
cases.prompt:
Starting text: cat sat on mat
Apply steps in order:
1) Replace 'cat' with 'dog'.
2) Replace 'mat' with 'rug'.
3) Prepend 'the '.
4) Append '.'.
Return only the final text.

cases.title: 6-step chained rewrite
cases.prompt:
Starting text: A-B-C
Apply steps in order:
1) Replace 'A' with 'alpha'.
2) Replace 'B' with 'beta'.
3) Replace 'C' with 'gamma'.
4) Replace '-' with '/'.
5) Prepend '['.
6) Append ']'.
Return only the final text.
